description: worker/nodes/encoder.py: ClipTextEncode node, mock branch only
context: Create worker/nodes/encoder.py with ClipTextEncode per ANVILML_DESIGN.md §10.3 EXACTLY: NODE_TYPE="ClipTextEncode", CATEGORY="Conditioning", INPUT_SLOTS=[SlotSpec("clip","CLIP"), SlotSpec("positive_text","STRING"), SlotSpec("negative_text","STRING",optional=True)], OUTPUT_SLOTS=[SlotSpec("conditioning","CONDITIONING")]. Architecture-agnostic - works with any loaded CLIP-compatible encoder, no per-arch dispatch in this node (the encoder already carries its own tokenizer/model from LoadClip). execute() branches on ctx.mock per §14.6: mock returns {"conditioning": {"mock": True, "positive_text": inputs["positive_text"]}}. Real branch is a bare placeholder raise for THIS task - completed next task. @register decorated. Acceptance: >=3 tests in worker/tests/test_nodes_encoder.py: mock returns the expected sentinel, missing optional negative_text doesn't error, node is in NODE_REGISTRY; `python -m pytest worker/tests/test_nodes_encoder.py -v` exits 0.

description: worker/nodes/encoder.py: ClipTextEncode real branch tokenizes + encodes
context: Complete ClipTextEncode's real branch (worker/nodes/encoder.py), the scope P24-A1 deferred: calls inputs["clip"]'s tokenizer (loaded by Qwen3's load(), Phase 22) on positive_text (and negative_text if provided), then the encoder's forward pass to produce a conditioning object. This node calls the encoder object directly - it does NOT dispatch through arch.clip.get_module() again, since the clip input already IS the fully-loaded module from LoadClip's real branch (Phase 22's P22-D1). Both markers required and passing from this task - no deferred-raise needed, the encoder is already loaded by the time this node runs. Acceptance: >=5 tests in worker/tests/test_nodes_encoder.py: real-mode execute against the Qwen3 fixture's loaded encoder produces a real conditioning output, negative_text omitted still succeeds, both markers name passing tests; `python -m pytest worker/tests/test_nodes_encoder.py -v -m real_mode` exits 0 (>=8 total).

description: worker/nodes/decode.py: VaeDecode node, mock branch only
context: Create worker/nodes/decode.py with VaeDecode per ANVILML_DESIGN.md §10.3 EXACTLY: NODE_TYPE="VaeDecode", CATEGORY="Decoding", INPUT_SLOTS=[SlotSpec("vae","VAE"), SlotSpec("latent","LATENT")], OUTPUT_SLOTS=[SlotSpec("image","IMAGE")]. execute() branches on ctx.mock per §14.6: mock returns {"image": {"mock": True, "shape": inputs["latent"].get("shape")}}. Real branch is a bare placeholder raise for THIS task - completed next task (unlike Sampler/decode() in Phases 21/23 which had no groundwork gap, this node's mock and real are split across two tasks purely for context-size reasons, not a design distinction). @register decorated. Acceptance: >=3 tests in worker/tests/test_nodes_decode.py: mock returns the sentinel, node is in NODE_REGISTRY; `python -m pytest worker/tests/test_nodes_decode.py -v` exits 0.

description: worker/nodes/decode.py: VaeDecode real branch dispatches to vae module
context: Complete VaeDecode's real branch (worker/nodes/decode.py), the scope P24-B1 deferred: calls arch.vae.get_module(inputs["vae"].arch).decode(inputs["vae"], inputs["latent"]) (Phase 23's zit_vae.py decode(), via dispatch - the vae input already IS the fully-loaded module from LoadVae's real branch). Both REAL_PATH_VERIFIED/MOCK_PATH_VERIFIED markers required, both passing from this task. Acceptance: >=5 new tests in test_nodes_decode.py: real-mode execute against the Phase 23 fixture's loaded VAE+latent produces a real PIL Image, both markers name passing tests; `python -m pytest worker/tests/test_nodes_decode.py -v -m real_mode` exits 0 (>=8 total).

description: worker/nodes/loader.py: EmptyLatent node, mock branch only
context: Create EmptyLatent in worker/nodes/loader.py (co-located with the loader nodes per §10.3's Loaders category grouping, even though it creates rather than loads) per ANVILML_DESIGN.md §10.3 EXACTLY: NODE_TYPE="EmptyLatent", CATEGORY="Latents", INPUT_SLOTS=[SlotSpec("width","INT"), SlotSpec("height","INT"), SlotSpec("batch_size","INT",optional=True), SlotSpec("model","MODEL",optional=True)], OUTPUT_SLOTS=[SlotSpec("latent","LATENT")]. Mock branch ignores the model input entirely per §10.3's note, returns a generic placeholder-shaped latent. Real branch is a bare placeholder raise for THIS task - completed next task. @register decorated. Acceptance: >=3 tests in worker/tests/test_nodes_loader.py: mock ignores a provided model input and returns the placeholder shape, node is in NODE_REGISTRY under EmptyLatent; `python -m pytest worker/tests/test_nodes_loader.py -v` exits 0.

description: worker/nodes/loader.py: EmptyLatent real branch via compute_latent_shape
context: Complete EmptyLatent's real branch (worker/nodes/loader.py), the scope P24-C1 deferred: model input is REQUIRED in real mode (raise a clear error if absent, per §10.3's 'required in real mode' note) - dispatches to arch.diffusion.get_module(model.arch).compute_latent_shape(width, height, batch_size) (Phase 21's P21-A1) for the actual architecture-specific shape, then allocates a zero/random-noise tensor of that shape. Both markers required and passing from this task. Acceptance: >=5 new tests in test_nodes_loader.py: real mode without a model input raises a clear error, real mode with the ZiT fixture's loaded model produces a latent matching compute_latent_shape()'s output, both markers name passing tests; `python -m pytest worker/tests/test_nodes_loader.py -v -m real_mode` exits 0.

description: worker/nodes/image.py: SaveImage node, mock branch only
context: Create worker/nodes/image.py with SaveImage per ANVILML_DESIGN.md §10.3 EXACTLY: NODE_TYPE="SaveImage", CATEGORY="Output", INPUT_SLOTS=[SlotSpec("image","IMAGE"), SlotSpec("seed","INT",optional=True), SlotSpec("steps","INT",optional=True)], OUTPUT_SLOTS=[] (no outputs - it emits an event instead). Mock branch per §14.6's example: emits ImageReady with a 64x64 black PNG via ctx.emit. Real branch is a bare placeholder raise for THIS task - completed next task. @register decorated. Acceptance: >=3 tests in worker/tests/test_nodes_image.py: mock emits ImageReady with a 64x64 black PNG, node is in NODE_REGISTRY under SaveImage; `python -m pytest worker/tests/test_nodes_image.py -v` exits 0.

description: worker/nodes/image.py: SaveImage real branch encodes PNG, emits ImageReady
context: Complete SaveImage's real branch (worker/nodes/image.py), the scope P24-D1 deferred: encodes the real PIL.Image input to PNG bytes, base64-encodes for the IPC payload, calls ctx.emit(WorkerEvent.ImageReady{...}) with the real image_b64/width/height/seed/steps - artifact_store writing happens Rust-side on receipt (Phase 15's event_loop.rs), this node only emits the event. Both markers required, both passing. Acceptance: >=5 new tests in test_nodes_image.py: real mode against a real PIL Image emits ImageReady with correctly base64-encoded real PNG bytes matching the input, seed/steps pass through unchanged, both markers name passing tests; `python -m pytest worker/tests/test_nodes_image.py -v -m real_mode` exits 0 (>=8 total).

description: worker/nodes/image.py: ImageResize node, mock + real (lanczos default)
context: Extend worker/nodes/image.py with ImageResize per ANVILML_DESIGN.md §10.3 EXACTLY: NODE_TYPE="ImageResize", CATEGORY="Images", INPUT_SLOTS=[SlotSpec("image","IMAGE"), SlotSpec("width","INT"), SlotSpec("height","INT"), SlotSpec("method","STRING",optional=True)], OUTPUT_SLOTS=[SlotSpec("image","IMAGE")]. method defaults to "lanczos" per the design doc's wording - implement via PIL.Image.resize with the PIL.Image.LANCZOS filter when method is unset or "lanczos"; other strings map to their PIL filter or raise a clear error if unrecognized. Both branches can call the same real PIL resize - resizing has no GPU/model dependency to mock around, only the ctx.mock branch structure per §14.6 is required. Both markers required. Acceptance: >=5 tests in test_nodes_image.py: resize produces the requested dimensions, default method is lanczos, an explicit method is honored, an unrecognized method errors clearly; `python -m pytest worker/tests/test_nodes_image.py -v -m real_mode` exits 0 (>=13 total).

description: anvilml-server: real end-to-end ZiT generation graph via POST /v1/jobs
context: No new production source files - wires together everything built across Phases 19-24 to verify the FULL generic-node graph (LoadModel+LoadVae+LoadClip+EmptyLatent+ClipTextEncode+Sampler+VaeDecode+SaveImage, per ANVILML_DESIGN.md Appendix B.2's exact example graph) executes end to end through real dispatch when submitted via POST /v1/jobs against the Phase 20/22/23 fixtures. Closes "ZiT Diffusion + Qwen3 CLIP + ZiT VAE" as a fully completed roadmap group - the first time the GENERIC node layer (not Phase 23's direct arch-module test) produces a real image through the actual dispatch pipeline. Acceptance: >=3 integration tests (Rust or Python, whichever the project owner confirms is more natural for this cross-language proof) asserting the full graph reaches Completed with a real, retrievable artifact; suite exits 0.

description: Runnable Proof: full graph submitted via POST /v1/jobs produces a real artifact
context: No new source files. Run the built binary in real (non-mock-hardware) mode against fixture checkpoints registered in the model registry, submit Appendix B.2's example graph (model_id values pointing at the Phase 20/22/23 fixtures) via POST /v1/jobs, poll until Completed, retrieve the artifact via GET /v1/artifacts/:hash, confirm it is a real, valid PNG with the requested dimensions - the first end-to-end real generation proof, closing the gap Phase 14's PassThrough-only proof deliberately left open. Record the literal terminal output in the implementation report. Acceptance: the full submit->poll->retrieve sequence succeeds against a live server in real mode, producing a retrievable, valid PNG matching the requested dimensions.
